title: Greg Burson
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
{{Image|person}}
'''Greg Burson''' ([[June 29]], [[1940s#1949|1949]]–[[July 22]], [[2008]]) was a voice actor who worked on several ''Star Wars'' [[Star Wars video games|video game]]s.

==''Star Wars'' work==
*''[[Star Wars Episode I: The Gungan Frontier]]'' - [[Rugor Nass/Legends|Boss Nass]], [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] Librarian
*[[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (video game)|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'' video game]] - Boss Nass, Guard Door, Injured Soldier #1, [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba's]] Porter, Shop Owner
*''[[Star Wars: Episode I Jedi Power Battles]]'' - Boss Nass, Peck
